name: Aberrations
description: Creatures from alien realities such as beholders, mind flayers, and other strange entities.

name: Beasts
description: Natural animals and predators of the wild.

name: Celestials
description: Holy beings tied to upper planes and divine power.

name: Constructs
description: Artificial creatures such as golems, animated armor, and living machines.

name: Dragons
description: Chromatic and metallic dragons and related draconic threats.

name: Elementals
description: Creatures of fire, water, air, earth, and other elemental forces.

name: Fey
description: Creatures tied to the Feywild, including tricksters and ancient spirits.

name: Fiends
description: Demons, devils, and other infernal beings.

name: Giants
description: Massive humanoids such as hill giants, frost giants, and storm giants.

name: Monstrosities
description: Unnatural predators and magical horrors like owlbears and manticores.

name: Oozes
description: Amorphous creatures such as gelatinous cubes and black puddings.

name: Plants
description: Animated or hostile flora and fungal threats.

name: Undead
description: Skeletons, zombies, ghosts, and other creatures sustained beyond death.

name: Humanoids
description: Choose one humanoid ancestry common in your campaign (for example: orcs, goblins, drow, or gnolls).
